\begin{tikzpicture}
\begin{axis}[
  parbench compact,
  ybar stacked,
  bar width=0.9cm,
  xtick={0,...,5},
  xticklabels={{\ensuremath{\mathrm{CUDA}{\to}\mathrm{OMP}}},{\ensuremath{\mathrm{OMP}{\to}\mathrm{CUDA}}},{\ensuremath{\mathrm{CUDA}{\to}\mathrm{OCL}}},{\ensuremath{\mathrm{OCL}{\to}\mathrm{CUDA}}},{\ensuremath{\mathrm{OMP}{\to}\mathrm{OCL}}},{\ensuremath{\mathrm{OCL}{\to}\mathrm{OMP}}}},

  anchor=south,
  legend columns=5, cells={anchor=west}},
  legend cell align={left},

  ymajorgrids=true, xmajorgrids=false,

]
  \addplot[ybar stacked, fill=pbPass, draw=black, line width=0.3pt,
           fill opacity=0.9,
           nodes near coords={\pgfmathfloattoint{\pgfplotspointmeta}\ifnum\pgfmathresult>1\relax\pgfmathresult\fi},

    coordinates {(0,16) (1,14) (2,4) (3,2) (4,6) (5,7)};
  \addlegendentry{Pass}
  \addplot[ybar stacked, fill=pbBuildFail, draw=black, line width=0.3pt,

           nodes near coords={\pgfmathfloattoint{\pgfplotspointmeta}\ifnum\pgfmathresult>1\relax\pgfmathresult\fi},

  \addlegendentry{Build Fail}

    coordinates {(0,0) (1,0) (2,15) (3,1) (4,11) (5,1)};
  \addlegendentry{Run Fail}
